articles.description: Upgrade to focus on Cardano UX just introduced

articles.title: Ethereum (ETH) Price on Cusp of Bullish Breakout amid Rising Wall Street Adoption
articles.description: Coinspeaker Ethereum (ETH) Price on Cusp of Bullish Breakout amid Rising Wall Street Adoption Several technical indicators and fundamental aspects point to a potential bullish breakout for Ethereum price in the near term towards its all-time high. articles.title: Base becomes largest Ethereum rollup by total value locked, surpassing Arbitrum
articles.description: Base, a Layer 2 Ethereum network developed by Coinbase, has now become the largest rollup in terms of total value locked.

articles.title: Solana's Total Value Locked Hits $6.1B
articles.description: Solana's total value locked surpasses $6.1 billion in October, fueled by meme coin hype, Raydium's trading surge, and record user growth.

articles.title: Shiba Inu to Rival Dogecoin with DeLorean SHIB Payments
articles.description: DeLorean Motors hints at accepting Shiba Inu as payment, sparking a potential rivalry with Dogecoin, which is backed by Tesla and Elon Musk.
